name: gemini-harness
description: Team-architecture factory for Gemini CLI — port of revfactory/harness v1.2.0. Build, audit, verify, evolve, and run agent teams generated from one-sentence domain descriptions.

harness.description: Harness meta-agent. Exposes harness.audit, harness.build, harness.verify, harness.evolve, harness.run.
